title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PolicyBazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PolicyBazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the PolicyBazaar family as a Backend Developer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PolicyBazaar:
PolicyBazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar!
